title: bischofia javanica var. lanceolata
intro: Bischofia javanica var. lanceolata, also known as Poro, is a variety of the Bischofia javanica plant, a type of tree native to Japan and Southeast Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Bischofia javanica var. lanceolata include reducing the risk of cardiovascular disease, improving blood circulation, and supporting liver health. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and its extracts are also used in modern supplements to support overall well-being.
